posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Managing your Organization with monday WorkCanvas

Our 3rd community webinar with Guy from the monday WorkCanvas team, is all about the best way to manage your organization using monday WorkCanvas. Guy, will share how you can unlock the full potential of WorkCanvas for organizational management, empowering you to manage resources, make strategic decisions, and execute efficiently. This session guides you through managing everything from company org charts to planning hiring processes, conducting interviews, and overseeing team resources like employee evaluations and 1:1 meetings. Guy also demonstrates the synergy between monday WorkCanvas and monday boards.

Any questions for @GuyWorkCanvas or the WorkCanvas team? As them in the comments below!
